description: You are a localization engineer preparing foreign language mixes for a video game cinematic cutscene in the session 'MyProject'. Using the audio stems in '/home/ga/Audio/localization/', create two stereo mixes (Spanish and French) that include the 'Music & Effects' stem (starting at 0.0s) and the respective dialogue stems ('dialogue_es.wav' or 'dialogue_fr.wav') aligned to the 4.0s mark. Export the Spanish mix to '/home/ga/Audio/exports/cinematic_es.wav' and the French mix to '/home/ga/Audio/exports/cinematic_fr.wav'. Save the session.
